findings.description: Section s2 consolidates 4 distinct h3 subsections from the source (codeSelectタグ, codeRadioButtonsタグ, codeCheckboxesタグ, codeCheckboxタグ), each containing attribute tables and JSP code examples. The combined plain-text content far exceeds 2000 characters, yet the knowledge file does not split them into separate sections. Per V3 rules, an h2 with ≥2000 chars of plain text that has h3 children should be split.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has h2 'コード値の表示方法' with four h3 subsections under it, each with its own attribute table and/or JSP implementation example.
